messages.author: TheHoovs
messages.text: Anyone in the Quad Cities area on here? I am looking at adding a few repaeaters around the area.
messages.content_html: Anyone in the Quad Cities area on here? I am looking at adding a few repaeaters around the area.

messages.author: TheHoovs
messages.text: It is, I'm building a few repeaters to put up, not sure how much it will help.
messages.content_html: It is, I'm building a few repeaters to put up, not sure how much it will help.

messages.author: The King
messages.text: Yea I plan on buying a few to set up as well someone named BD-RG1 already has like 5 meshcore up which is nice It'd be cool to be able to contact him to coordinate with
messages.content_html: Yea I plan on buying a few to set up as well someone named BD-RG1 already has like 5 meshcore up which is nice It'd be cool to be able to contact him to coordinate with

messages.author: TheHoovs
messages.content_html: Where are they going up?

messages.author: The King
messages.text: I plan on putting most of them up in Davenport I plan on putting them mostly in parks like credit Island, fejervary park and Vanderveer hbu
messages.content_html: I plan on putting most of them up in Davenport I plan on putting them mostly in parks like credit Island, fejervary park and Vanderveer hbu

messages.author: TheHoovs
messages.text: I have a grain bin/silo system I am putting one on right near I-80 at the Mississippi
messages.content_html: I have a grain bin/silo system I am putting one on right near I-80 at the Mississippi

messages.author: The King
messages.text: Yea I seen the rak 1w I wonder how much farther it sends the signal than normal currently I plan on putting up the seeed Solar P1 Pro
messages.content_html: Yea I seen the rak 1w I wonder how much farther it sends the signal than normal currently I plan on putting up the seeed Solar P1 Pro

messages.author: TheHoovs
messages.text: I really want to mess with them once I have a few, I have a few good spots scouted where they would have some great LOS. I want to maximize the returns on those spots if possible
messages.content_html: I really want to mess with them once I have a few, I have a few good spots scouted where they would have some great LOS. I want to maximize the returns on those spots if possible

messages.author: TheHoovs
messages.text: I see you've been out Mapping @The King
messages.content_html: I see you've been out Mapping @The King

messages.author: The King
messages.text: Yea it seems like a fun passive hobby, I figure it'd help to know where the repeater thats already up reaches so when I receive the 4 repeaters I have coming I know at least somewhat the most optimal places to put them so they all connect @TheHoovs
messages.content_html: Yea it seems like a fun passive hobby, I figure it'd help to know where the repeater thats already up reaches so when I receive the 4 repeaters I have coming I know at least somewhat the most optimal places to put them so they all connect @TheHoovs

messages.author: TheHoovs
messages.text: I have one in Le Claire, I have a few more to build that I would like to start getting setup along the interstate
messages.content_html: I have one in Le Claire, I have a few more to build that I would like to start getting setup along the interstate

messages.author: The King
messages.text: I bet along either side and down the river would work great too since it's all flat like if it weaves back and forth across the river I bet it could go like 30 miles with maybe 7 repeaters @TheHoovs (edited)
messages.content_html: I bet along either side and down the river would work great too since it's all flat like if it weaves back and forth across the river I bet it could go like 30 miles with maybe 7 repeaters @TheHoovs (edited)

messages.author: The King
messages.text: Have you added your node to the internet map? (edited)
messages.content_html: Have you added your node to the internet map? (edited)

messages.author: TheHoovs
messages.text: My repeater shows up on MeshMapper now
messages.content_html: My repeater shows up on MeshMapper now

messages.author: The King
messages.text: I mean the meshcore Internet Map you add it by pressing the 3 dots in the top right corner on the meshcore app and going to internet map then pressing the 3 dots again and pressing add me to map
messages.content_html: I mean the meshcore Internet Map you add it by pressing the 3 dots in the top right corner on the meshcore app and going to internet map then pressing the 3 dots again and pressing add me to map

messages.author: TheHoovs
messages.text: I'm moving over to the new official Discord, I'll start another regional channel there if you decide to hop in.
messages.content_html: I'm moving over to the new official Discord, I'll start another regional channel there if you decide to hop in.
